summary: Photo to Comic (Convert Photos To Comic Character) feature tested. Backend APIs fully working (24 styles, pricing, copyright keyword blocking). Frontend wizard working with mode selection, 3-step Avatar flow, 5-step Strip flow, style tabs, add-ons, and live cost calculator. Fixed minor 404 issue for /api/user/profile endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/photo-to-comic/styles returns all 24 styles correctly - VERIFIED
GET /api/photo-to-comic/pricing returns correct pricing structure - VERIFIED
Copyright keyword blocking works for: batman, spiderman, disney, marvel characters, anime characters - VERIFIED
Safe prompts like 'masked hero' are accepted - VERIFIED
Mode selection shows Comic Avatar (RECOMMENDED, 3 Steps, 15cr) and Comic Strip (POPULAR, 5 Steps, 25cr) - VERIFIED
Step progress indicator correctly shows 1-2-3 for Avatar and 1-2-3-4-5 for Strip - VERIFIED
Photo upload with preview working - VERIFIED
Style category tabs (Action, Fun, Soft, Fantasy, Kids, Minimal) working - VERIFIED
Add-ons with dynamic cost calculation working - VERIFIED
Content Policy notice displayed at bottom - VERIFIED
Fixed fetchUserPlan() to use /api/auth/me instead of non-existent /api/user/profile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo to Comic feature at /app/photo-to-comic is fully functional. Two modes: Comic Avatar (3 steps: upload, style, generate - 15 credits base) and Comic Strip (5 steps: upload, story, style, dialogue, generate - 25-45 credits based on panels). Copyright keyword blocking working both frontend and backend. API endpoints: /api/photo-to-comic/styles, /api/photo-to-comic/pricing, /api/photo-to-comic/generate, /api/photo-to-comic/job/{id}, /api/photo-to-comic/history

features: Comic Avatar card with RECOMMENDED badge
Comic Strip card with POPULAR badge
Next button disabled until photo uploaded
6 style category tabs (action, fun, soft, fantasy, kids, minimal)
Add-ons: Transparent BG (+3), Multiple Poses (+5), HD Export (+5)

copyright_blocking.error_message: Copyrighted content detected - We create original comic characters only

backend_endpoints.POST /api/photo-to-comic/generate: 400 for blocked keywords, 200 for safe prompts

fix_applied.fix: Changed to use /api/auth/me which returns plan field
